name: Deviled Crab Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chopped green pepper and parsley until just wilted. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the crabmeat, mashed potatoes, onion powder, Old Bay seasoning, parsley, chopped green pepper, and beaten egg.
3. Shape the mixture into croquettes.
4. Roll each croquette in cracker meal to coat evenly.
5. Heat oil for frying in a deep fryer or heavy skillet.
6. Fry the croquettes until golden brown, turning occasionally, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
